calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Turnover Assets And Transfer Shares Of Stock And Membership Interests
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff and Judgment Creditor SPIGA III, LLC's Motion For An Order To Turnover Assets And Transfer Shares Of Stock And Membership Interests is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court will execute the proposed order served with the moving papers directing Defendant and Judgment Creditor Anuradha Singh to turnover, assign and transfer to the levying officer certain identified assets to the end of satisfying the judgment in this action. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 699.040, 708.205, 187.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Turnover Assets And Transfer Shares Of Stock And Membership Interests
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SPIGA III, LLC.'s Motion For An Order To Turnover Assets And Transfer Shares Of Stock And Membership Interests.

Continued to January 21, 2026 on court's own motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Spiga Iii, Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion Regarding Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Default Judgment Against Defendant Anuradha Singh
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:27 and concluding at 9:49 am.

Plaintiff SPIGA III, LLC. is represented by Robert Yorio, Esq.
Defendant Anuradha Singh not appearing.

DANATO SCOTTI is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

DANATO SCOTTI is examined by the court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff SPIGA III, LLC., and against Defendant Anuradha Singh, as follows:

1. Damages: $65,941.62
2. Prejudgment Interest: $4,846.71
3. Costs: $1,934.57
4. Attorney fees: $6,325.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $79,048.40
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed Judgment for review and signature.(D505)
